options.description: Generate text descriptions and prompts from an image. Returns a new Job ID.

options.description: Generates a 2x2 image grid from a prompt. Returns the Job ID.

options.name: Outpaint
options.description: Generate an image in a specified direction with a scale ratio. Returns a new Job ID.

options.name: Pan
options.description: Extend the image canvas in a specified direction with a scale ratio. Returns a new Job ID.

options.name: Reroll
options.description: Regenerate images using the same prompt from a previous job. Returns a new Job ID.

options.name: Shorten
options.description: Analyze and shorten a prompt to its key elements. Returns a new Job ID.

options.name: Upscale
options.description: Upscale one of the grid images from a previous job. Returns a new Job ID.

options.name: Variation
options.description: Create variations of a selected image, optionally with a remix prompt. Returns a new Job ID.

options.name: Get
options.description: Fetch the status and result of a job by its ID

options.name: Extend Video
options.description: Extend existing videos with seamless continuation and motion. Returns a new Job ID.

options.name: Upscale Video
options.description: Enhance video resolution and quality using AI upscaling technology. Returns a new Job ID.

options.name: Video Diffusion
options.description: Generate dynamic videos from text prompts or existing images. Returns a new Job ID.

nodeDescription.name: n8n-nodes-preview-mallabe-images.mallabeImages
nodeDescription.subtitle: ={{ $parameter["operation"] + ": " + $parameter["resource"] }}

options.name: Blur Image
options.description: Blur images and send the new image to another integration

options.name: Compress Image
options.description: Compress images and drive the new image to another integration.Note: if a given URL isn't an image file (png, jpg/jpeg, etc..) - the file will not convert. Note: some Zapier integrations give URLs that are protected - these can't be used & compressed.

options.name: Crop Image
options.description: Crop images and send the new image to another integration. Note: If a given URL isn't an image file (e.g., png, jpg/jpeg, gif), the file will not convert. Also, some Zapier integrations provide protected URLs that cannot be cropped.

options.name: Extract Image Metadata
options.description: Extract image metadata. Note: some integrations give URLs that are protected - these can't be used & resized.

options.name: Flip Image
options.description: Flip images and send the new image to another integration

options.name: Greyscale Image
options.description: Greyscale images and send the new image to another integration

options.name: Join/Combine Images
options.description: Join images into one image and send the new image to another integration

options.name: Resize Image
options.description: Resize or Scale images and drive the new image to another integration. Note: if a given URL isn't an image file (png, jpg/jpeg, gif, etc..) - the file will not convert.Note: some Zapier integrations give URLs that are protected - these can't be used & resized.

options.name: Rotate Image
options.description: Rotate images and send the new image to another integration

nodeDescription.description: Mallabe Images is an automation toolchain that allows you to process images, resize, crop and apply other manipulations on images on the fly.

attributes.description: Mallabe Images is an automation toolchain that allows you to process images, resize, crop and apply other manipulations on images on the fly.
attributes.name: n8n-nodes-mallabe-images.mallabeImages
